title: Smart Water Bottle Product Launch
brief: Create a 30-second product launch video for a smart water bottle that tracks hydration, glows gently when it is time to drink, and syncs with a mobile app.
requiredPipelineChecks: Producer creates task graph and success criteria
Research identifies audience pain points without relying on public-figure news
Story Director writes concise voiceover and caption blocks
Asset Agent proposes original product visuals or user-upload/public-source fallback
Video Engineer maps each spoken line to visible screen events
Render exports a vertical final video package
Quality Gate checks captions, audio sync, visual evidence, and package completeness
knownLimitations: Full image generation requires an approved image provider or local Codex/ChatGPT imagegen capability.
If imagegen is unavailable, final packaging must block honestly instead of faking product hero visuals.
